640000.name: Boosting Staff
descriptionLines: A special staff prepared for your rapid growth.
Aumenta ^FF0000Fogo^000000 elemental magic o dano em 3%.
Aumenta ^FF0000Fogo^000000 elemental magic o dano em additional 1%.
Aumenta ^777777Fantasma^000000, ^33CC00Vento^000000, ^0000BBÁgua^000000 elemental magic o dano em 10%.
Quando combinado com ^990099Elemental Booster Robe^000000, ^990099Elemental Booster Muffler^000000, ^990099Elemental Booster Shoes^000000 e ^990099Elemental Booster Earring^000000:
Aumenta o dano mágico contra all sized enemies em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 em 1%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 em additional 20% for 60 segundos.
Quando combinado com ^990099Default Booster Robe^000000, ^990099Default Booster Muffler^000000, ^990099Default Booster Shoes^000000 e ^990099Default Booster Earring^000000:
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Impacto Espiritual^000000 em 1%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Impacto Espiritual^000000 em additional 20% for 60 segundos.

640004.name: Blue Crystal Staff
descriptionLines: A staff with the power of cold ice used em some arch wizards in the past.
It resonates with Ancient Hero's Boots.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Jack Frost^000000 em 12%.
Aumenta ^0000BBÁgua^000000 elemental magic o dano em 7%.
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade of ^009900Jack Frost^000000 em 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano mágico contra ^FF0000Fogo^000000 elemental monsters em 7%.
Chance aleatória to increase INT em 20 e ATQM em 15% for 7 segundos quando causar dano mágico.

640005.name: Pride Stone
descriptionLines: Scientific instrument that was kept in the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta ^777777Neutro^000000 e ^0000BBÁgua^000000 elemental magic o dano em 15%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável em 3%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Comet^000000 e ^009900Jack Frost^000000 em 10%.
Diminui ^009900Jack Frost^000000 skill cooldown em 1.5 segundos.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Comet^000000 e ^009900Jack Frost^000000 em additional 20%.

640009.name: Crimson strain Booster Staff
descriptionLines: A Two-Heed Staff designed to help adventurers grow.
ATQM +3 (Applies até o nível de base 195)
Aumenta ^FF0000Fogo^000000 e ^CC5500Terra^000000 elemental magic o dano em 1%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 e ^009900Abalo Sísmico^000000 em 25%.
Aumenta o dano mágico contra all sized enemies em 15%.
Aumenta ^FF0000Fogo^000000 e ^CC5500Terra^000000 elemental magic o dano em additional 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 e ^009900Abalo Sísmico^000000 em additional 15%.

640010.name: Chain Jack Booster Staff
descriptionLines: A Two-Heed Staff designed to help adventurers grow.
ATQM +3 (Applies até o nível de base 195)
Aumenta ^33CC00Vento^000000 e ^0000BBÁgua^000000 elemental magic o dano em 1%.
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade de todas as habilidades em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Corrente Elétrica^000000 e ^009900Jack Frost^000000 em 25%.
Aumenta o dano mágico contra all sized enemies em 15%.
Aumenta ^33CC00Vento^000000 e ^0000BBÁgua^000000 elemental magic o dano em additional 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Corrente Elétrica^000000 e ^009900Jack Frost^000000 em additional 15%.

640011.name: Patent Aeon Staff
descriptionLines: Metal staff made from stainless steel.
It is said that an ancient wizard made it.
It resonates with Great Hero Boots.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Abalo Sísmico^000000 em 12%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em 10%.
Aumenta ^FF0000Fogo^000000 e ^CC5500Terra^000000 elemental magic o dano em 15%.
Diminui ^009900Abalo Sísmico^000000 skill cooldown em 1 segundo.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em additional 5%.
Aumenta o dano mágico contra todos os tamanhos em 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 em 15%.

640012.name: Patent Blue Crystal Staff
descriptionLines: A staff with the power of cold ice used em some arch wizards in the past.
Seeing the power of cold magic, it began to show its natural power.
It resonates with Great Hero Boots.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Jack Frost^000000 em 12%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades em 10%.
Aumenta ^0000BBÁgua^000000 e ^33CC00Vento^000000 elemental magic o dano em 15%.
Diminui ^009900Jack Frost^000000 skill cooldown em 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano mágico contra todos os tamanhos em 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Corrente Elétrica^000000 em 15%.

640013.name: Fortified Staff
descriptionLines: A weapon enhanced em using Etel's magical power.
New abilities that had not been discovered before began to emerge.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Frozen Slash^000000 em 5%.
Aumenta all elemental magic o dano em 2%.

640014.name: Penitentia Termes
descriptionLines: A staff containing the pain of bereavement.
Increases o dano of ^009900Crimson Arrow^000000 and ^009900Frozen Slash^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 and ^009900Frost Misty^000000 by 3%.
Decreases Variable Casting Time of all skills by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 and ^009900Frost Misty^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases ^FF0000Fogo^000000 and ^0000BBÁgua^000000 elemental magic o dano by 10%.
[Grade D]: o dano of ^009900Crimson Arrow^000000 and ^009900Frozen Slash^000000 +5%.
[Grade C]: o dano of ^009900Crimson Arrow^000000 and ^009900Frozen Slash^000000 +8%, S.MATK +1.
[Grade B]: o dano of ^009900Crimson Arrow^000000 and ^009900Frozen Slash^000000 +12%, SPL +2.

640015.name: Penitentia Virga
descriptionLines: A staff containing the pain of bereavement.

Increases o dano of ^009900Corrente Elétrica^000000 and ^009900Abalo Sísmico^000000 by 3%.

[Grade C]: o dano of ^009900Storm Cannon^000000 and ^009900Rock Down^000000 +8%, S.MATK +1.
[Grade B]: o dano of ^009900Storm Cannon^000000 and ^009900Rock Down^000000 +12%, SPL +2.

640017.name: Thanos Two-Handed Staff-AD
descriptionLines: Thanos' two-handed staff remodeled with the addition of Tim Artnard's technology.
Magical attacks have a random chance to recover 1000 HP and 100 SP every second for 4 seconds.
Increases o dano of ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 by 10%.
Decreases After Skill Delay of all skills by 10%.
Increases ^FF0000Fogo^000000 and ^CC5500Terra^000000 elemental magic o dano by 15%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Abalo Sísmico^000000 by 40%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Meteoro Escarlate^000000 by additional 15%.
Increases o dano mágico contra all sized enemies by 15%.
Decreases o dano recebido from all elemental enemies by 15%.
[Grade D]: MATK +2%, o dano of ^009900Floral Flare Road^000000 and ^009900Stratum Tremor^000000 +10%.
[Grade B]: o dano of ^009900Floral Flare Road^000000 and ^009900Stratum Tremor^000000 +10%.

Increases o dano of ^009900Comet^000000 by additional 25%.
